content:
# Final Review Votes
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.5-xhigh

## Summary

Accepted the amendment; the described retry hole is a real durability/idempotency bug in covered_by_existing_bead reconciliation.

## Votes

- `fr-4-542a8476`: Accept
  The code skips posting when the local comment already contains the exact amendment marker and only flushes when comments_posted > 0. Because sync_flush leaves the local mutation marker dirty on failure while the local bead detail can already show the comment, a retry can return Ok without retrying the required flush. That can falsely mark reconciliation complete while the comment remains unflushed. The fix should retry a guarded own-dirty flush when an existing marker is observed or after the loop whenever this adapter has recoverable pending mutations.
